programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: At a sprawling Texas ranch, a mysterious young man nicknamed Cooncat (John Barrymore Jr.) tells rancher Horse Davis (Basil Ruysdael) an improbable story about a murder at a nearby trading post. His descriptions of the men he believes committed the crime, Smiling Man (Jack Elam) and Roper (Dave Kashner), fit those of two members of a rival family who were killed during a land fight years earlier. Another shooting draws Horse's future son-in-law, Pat Farrell (John Archer), into the mystery.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: When rancher and single mother of two Maggie Gilkeson (Cate Blanchett) sees her teenage daughter, Lily (Evan Rachel Wood), kidnapped by Apache rebels, she reluctantly accepts the help of her estranged father, Samuel (Tommy Lee Jones), in tracking down the kidnappers. Along the way, the two must learn to reconcile the past and work together if they are going to have any hope of getting Lily back before she is taken over the border and forced to become a prostitute.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: David and Bathsheba
programme.desc: King David and the beautiful Bathsheba's adulterous love risks David his throne, country and even the wrath of God. Told in occasional flashback, the film sees him conquer Goliath and lead his armies to victory before the prophet Nathan brings the word of Jehovah and His judgment, which sees David atone for his sins.

programme.title: Panhandle
programme.desc: John Sands (Rod Cameron), a reformed outlaw living in a small Mexican town, learns that his brother has been killed in the Texas Panhandle, and he sets out to investigate. When he arrives, he's confronted by a trio of gunslingers working for Matt Garson (Reed Hadley), a local gambler and saloon owner. He also begins to court June O'Carroll (Anne Gwynne), Garson's secretary. John soon grows to believe Garson is responsible for his brother's death, leading to a final showdown.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady
programme.desc: In 1897 New York, Rose Gillray (Ginger Rogers) struggles to keep her corset business afloat. When Rose suggests that singer Molly Wade (Carol Channing) wear her daring new corset in her revue, the show is shut down. In debt to steel manufacturer Jim Carter (David Brian), Rose declares she can sell steel wire to stubborn cattle ranchers in Texas and clear her debt. Along the way, Rose is joined by Molly, inventor Charles Masters (Barry Nelson) and cattle baron Joel Kingdom (James Arness).

programme.title: Seminole Uprising
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant (George Montgomery) is ordered to go after Florida Indians in Texas.

programme.title: Angel in My Pocket
programme.desc: After minister Sam Whitehead (Andy Griffith) moves to his new post in a small Kansas town, he finds that the place is in total gridlock because of a feud between the families of Mayor Will Sinclair (Henry Jones) and his rival Axel Gresham (Edgar Buchanan). Meanwhile, Sam's reckless brother-in-law, Bubba (Jerry Van Dyke), turns the church boiler into an alcohol still. Sam is ready to quit when his friend Art (Gary Collins) decides to enter politics in order to change the town for the better.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome (Rita Hayworth) is the daughter of King Herod (Charles Laughton) of Galilee. Cast out after her affair with Caesar's nephew, Salome finds herself back in the kingdom of her father when she falls in love with Claudius (Stewart Granger), the commander of her father's army. Meanwhile, Salome's evil mother, Queen Herodias, is continually being condemned by John the Baptist, and plotting to use Salome as a tool to get the prophet executed.

programme.title: Crookhaven
programme.desc: 7/8. The Crooklings compete at the cutthroat trials, with the eyes of the crooked world watching. The Nameless spy resorts to desperate measures, and Jia leads the search for Amira. [S,AD]

programme.title: Crookhaven
programme.desc: 8/8. The Masquerade Ball reveals everyone's true colours, an enemy within forces Gabriel to question everything, and Caspian's plan starts to unravel, putting Penelope in grave danger. [S,AD]

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and Charlotte Smith head to the National Forest in the Midlands as it reaches a milestone moment: the planting of its 10-millionth tree.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: 2/5. David Attenborough reveals the hidden lives of foxes, hedgehogs, blue tits and frogs, each making a life for themselves in a small urban garden in Bristol. [S,AD]

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow returns to Cromford Mills in Derbyshire, where finds include a rare opal collection, a pair of 300-year-old long johns and an Albert Medal for gallantry.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: 9/10. During a group hike up Scafell Pike, Mary prepares to speak her heart, but a fateful miscommunication and a sudden storm threaten to throw everything off course. [S,AD]

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: 10/10. Mary receives a surprising offer and faces renewed pressure from her mother to find a match. With Mr Hayward absent from London, she must decide what happiness looks like for her. [S,AD]

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: 6/6. Carey is drawn deeper into Simon's insidious plan, with devastating consequences. Contains strong language, graphic violence and upsetting scenes. [S,AD]

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gabby Logan presents highlights from Sunday's four Premier League games, including title contenders Manchester City against Chelsea.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actors Ralph Fiennes, Anna Faris, Olivia Cooke and comedian Michelle de Swarte. Contains some strong language and adult humour.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: 1/25. Charlotte fixes a little Range Rover that represents a big globetrotting adventure, Chris takes on a historic scrapbook, and Dean restores a trailblazing ballerina's pointe shoes. [S,AD]

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.desc: 11/15. A County Down farmer calls in a search team for missing cows, a North Yorkshire officer catches deer poachers, and Paul explores how DNA could help prevent dog attacks on sheep.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E08 Gator Raid With herds in two states, the cowboys must split up to handle all of the work; Booger and Bubba track down a predator preying on calves in Florida; Cody processes a cattle shipment in Alabama; the gang helps Matthew with a school science project.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E09 Specialty Sales and Recipe Fails The cowboys round up cattle and ship them to south Florida; Cody and Misty debate whether to stage another specialty cattle sale; Bubba finds a buyer for the horses he's been training; Booger and Jaclyn attempt to re-create Grandma's cowboy recipes.

programme.desc: S05 E08 Mark's Rifle Mark befriends a circus advance-man suspected of robbery.

programme.desc: When his best friend is brutally gunned down, a former sheriff is left with many questions and no answers. After the investigation stalls and his replacement turns a blind eye, he takes the case into his own hands.

programme.desc: S01 E06 Stage West A young widow tries to take possession of her late husband's silver mine.

programme.desc: S07 E10 Generations to Come Booger and Bubba try to keep up while Cody is busy with his specialty cattle sale; Cody packs the barn with buyers; Bubba renovates a room for the new baby; Booger adds personal stories to Grandma's cowboy cookbook.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E11 Let It Ripp The cowboys' skills are put to the test when equipment failure deters their cattle shipment; Booger enters a local horse-cutting competition; Cody organizes a campout at the Sheriff's Boys Ranch; everyone celebrates at the Thompson's baby shower.

programme.desc: S05 E10 Squeeze Play An unscrupulous land buyer tries to get Lucas to sell his ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E11 Gun Shy Mark takes a sudden aversion to his father's rifle after one of his friends is killed.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E20 What Are You Doing After the Massacre? A 147-year-old Indian chief decides to capture Fort Courage and win back the U.S.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E21 A Horse of Another Color F Troop sets out to snare a wild stallion, but ends up captured.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E02 The Bandit Queen The true tale of Pearl Hart, the notorious "Bandit Queen"; with no money to care for her gravely ill mother, Pearl makes a fateful decision to enter a life of crime and soon becomes the first woman to rob a stagecoach in the Old West.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Dalton Gang The Dalton Gang attempts to pull off the most brazen bank robbery of the Old West when they hatch a plan to rob two banks at the same time; when their plan explodes in a hail of gunfire, only one Dalton is left alive to tell the tale.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S01 E07 Daniel Boone: Hero of Kentucky Frontiersman Daniel Boone leads settlers to the newly discovered lands of Kentucky, but his daughter is soon abducted by a Cherokee chief; in a frantic race to save his daughter, Boone goes from being a settler to a warrior.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E02 Ghosts Teaspoon (Anthony Zerbe) is haunted by a ghostly figure from his past who has returned to seek vengeance.

programme.desc: S01 E07 Relic of Fort Tejon Bret wins an "imported Arabian mount" in a poker match.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S01 E15 The Last Train West Cheyenne escapes from prison.

programme.desc: S01 E27 The Last Trophy Two British socialites find that they still have a lot to learn when they visit their friends, the Cartwrights.

programme.desc: S01 E18 The Photographer Lucas' old friend, a traveling photographer, is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E19 Shivaree A young couple traveling in a wagon train causes trouble for all of North Fork.

programme.desc: S01 E20 The Dead-Eye Kid A smart-aleck boy from Brooklyn comes west to seek his fortune.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Gemini Man
programme.desc: (2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen.

programme.title: Tombstone
programme.desc: (1993) Western. Kurt Russell stars in the story of legendary Wild West lawman Wyatt Earp told through the medium of the moustache. With Val Kilmer as 'Doc' Holliday and Charlton Heston.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: (2018) Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.

programme.title: The Mustang
programme.desc: (2019) Heartfelt drama with Matthias Schoenaerts. A violent convict gets a chance at rehabilitation through a programme training wild mustangs. Will he make the most of his second chance?

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: You, Me, Garden?
programme.desc: In the first episode of series two, Clara and the gardening team head to south London on a mission to create a mini urban farm in Mari and Ali's disused courtyard.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: (1961) Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel. Two men fleeing the US Civil War find an island inhabited by monsters (animated by Ray Harryhausen) and the mysterious Captain Nemo.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma

programme.title: Everything Eichler

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting

programme.title: Pigman: The Series

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.
